channel.title: The Valve Wire Weekly
channel.description: A weekly podcast covering the latest in transcatheter valve technology — TAVR, mitral repair and replacement, tricuspid therapies, clinical trials, and industry analysis. Balanced, evidence-based analysis with expert skepticism. Hosted by E. Nolan Beckett.
channel.itunes:author: E. Nolan Beckett
channel.itunes:summary: Weekly analysis of transcatheter valve technology developments for cardiac surgeons, interventional cardiologists, trainees, patients, and industry stakeholders. We present balanced, circumspect analysis — always questioning whether therapies have gotten ahead of the evidence.
